_description: Blueprint for parallel code review teams. Three reviewers run simultaneously.
_workflow: Parallel: lead → [security, correctness, style] → lead aggregates

roles.name: lead
roles.role: Aggregator — collects findings from all reviewers, deduplicates, produces final report

roles.name: security-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: injection, auth bypass, exposed secrets, unsafe input, OWASP top 10

roles.name: correctness-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: logic errors, null access, race conditions, missing edge cases, test coverage

roles.name: style-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: naming conventions, vertical slice violations, code organization, dead code

sequence: lead distributes diff to all reviewers
security, correctness, style review in parallel
lead aggregates findings, deduplicates, produces final verdict
